pi_items.source: ChemicalBook, CAMEO Chemicals NOAA - boiling point at 101.3 kPa (760 mmHg) is 34°C
ChemicalBook, CAMEO Chemicals NOAA - flash point (closed cup) is -37°C
DOT 49 CFR 173.121 classification rules: BP=34°C (≤35°C) → PG I
CDC NIOSH, NIST WebBook, ChemicalBook - boiling point is 232°F (approximately 110-111°C)
CDC NIOSH, CAMEO Chemicals NOAA - flash point (closed cup) is 40°F (approximately 4.4°C)
DOT 49 CFR 173.121 classification rules: BP=110°C (>35°C) AND FP=4°C (<23°C) → PG II
NIST WebBook, PubChem, ChemicalBook, CAMEO Chemicals NOAA - boiling point is 155.65°C
Sigma-Aldrich, Fisher Scientific MSDS, ChemicalBook - flash point (closed cup) is 43.9-44°C
DOT 49 CFR 173.121 classification rules: BP=155°C (>35°C) AND FP=44°C (≥23°C) → PG III
NIST WebBook, PubChem, ChemicalBook - boiling point is 81.6-81.65°C (rounded to 82°C)
NIST WebBook, CAMEO Chemicals NOAA, ChemicalBook - flash point is 2°C
DOT 49 CFR 173.121 classification rules: BP=82°C (>35°C) AND FP=2°C (<23°C) → PG II

Task specification for verifier tolerance check
All four chemicals confirmed to exist on CAMEO Chemicals: Propylene Oxide (#5159), Toluene (#4654), Cyclohexanone (#3044), Acetonitrile (#11)

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified as accurate. The four chemicals (Propylene Oxide, Toluene, Cyclohexanone, Acetonitrile) are real compounds accessible on CAMEO Chemicals NOAA database. Boiling points: Propylene Oxide 34°C, Toluene 110°C, Cyclohexanone 155°C, Acetonitrile 82°C. Flash points: Propylene Oxide -37°C, Toluene 4°C, Cyclohexanone 44°C, Acetonitrile 2°C. DOT Packing Group classifications are correct per 49 CFR 173.121: Propylene Oxide PG I (BP≤35°C), Toluene PG II (BP>35°C, FP<23°C), Cyclohexanone PG III (BP>35°C, FP≥23°C), Acetonitrile PG II (BP>35°C, FP<23°C). The task requires creating a CSV report using data from CAMEO Chemicals with specified tolerances of ±10°C for both BP and FP.
